brand.wordmarkUse: fallback label and accessibility text only; not universal logo
brand.systemLineUse: supporting metadata; do not place directly under primary identity by default
brand.subtitle: Controlled consolidation, source authority, and publish readiness
brand.logoPolicy: Use supplied project-specific assets. Achilles uses the node-globe/Achilles asset; Romer, EMASSC, Raphael, DeSporte, LightSpeed and Eco-X use their respective supplied assets where surface context matches.
brand.visualTone: technical, calm, dark-surface, badge-led, claim-gated, field-specific
brand.paletteSource: Romer Industries Pallette.png and brand_asset_manifest palette aliases
brandNotes: Use consistent CL/gate/status badges across all documents and route shells.
Prefer source authority and review state over decorative graphics.
Use project-specific assets rather than a single universal Achilles wordmark.
Keep claim-sensitive surfaces visibly locked until reviewed.
Use dashboard order classification for system, project, and function landings.

dashboardClassification.interactiveRequirement: Every dashboard must include source authority, status/blocker badges, drilldown or filter path, open-task/next-action panel, and field-specific branding.

guardrails: Use packets before public deployment work.
Static fallback is required for interactive components.
Owner sign-off is required before public release.
Any failed post-publish check becomes an OPEN_TASKS item or task delta entry.

landingGraphs.title: Package status
landingGraphs.interaction: click-through to package map and task rows
landingGraphs.purpose: Show current package families and whether they are complete, active, pending, or blocked.

landingGraphs.title: Route readiness
landingGraphs.interaction: filter by route, deploy state, claim gate, and next action
landingGraphs.purpose: Show LightSpeed / CYC routes, deploy state, claim gate, and next action.

landingGraphs.title: Achilles node globe
landingGraphs.purpose: Show Achilles, LightSpeed, W1-W6, D1-D6, Raphael, CCC, SHFF, M1, digital twin suite, and governance gates.

landingGraphs.title: Blocker matrix
landingGraphs.interaction: filter by blocker class and owner
landingGraphs.purpose: Show current blockers: Drive moves, spreadsheet mutation, transfer readiness, public deployment, checksum selection.

landingGraphs.title: Transfer batches
landingGraphs.interaction: batch gate status and transfer readiness filters
landingGraphs.purpose: Show T1-T5 transfer batches and readiness gates before achilles.romer handoff.

landingGraphs.title: Function rollup
landingGraphs.interaction: system to project to function drilldown
landingGraphs.purpose: Show functions rolling up into projects and projects rolling up into system dashboards.

routes.title: Raphael Engine Panels
routes.claimGate: simulation only / proof required / no validation claim

documentTemplates.logPolicy: Retain consolidated logs at the back of workbooks and in final package documents. Do not delete version history until extraction and approval.

blockedActions: destructive Drive update without owner approval
